nasb.text: Then Jonathan arose from the table in fierce anger, and did not eat food on the second day of the new moon, for he was grieved over David because his father had dishonored him.

esv.text: And Jonathan rose from the table in fierce anger and ate no food the second day of the month, for he was grieved for David, because his father had disgraced him.

cnv.text: 約拿單怒氣沖沖地從席間退去，初二這天，他沒有吃飯；因為他父親羞辱了大衛，他就為大衛擔憂。

ccb.text: 他怒气冲冲地离席，整天不肯进食，因为他看见父亲如此卑劣地对待大卫，心里非常难过。
